cases.title: Program Contract and Parity Dashboard Integrity
preconditions: Pilot tenant has commerce module enabled.
Parity master to-do and MVP contract files are present.
Observability dashboard is available for the tenant.
steps: Open /commerce/parity and capture overall completion and MVP completion values.
Confirm target segment renders as quick service.
Verify MVP unresolved IDs list matches unchecked/in-progress CLV IDs in master to-do.
Open /commerce/observability and verify POS SLO targets are visible.
Confirm schema terms used in UI align to canonical order/payment/tender terminology.
expected: Parity dashboard loads without errors and calculates weighted completion correctly.
MVP contract metadata is visible and consistent with contract file.
MVP unresolved list contains no unknown IDs.
POS SLO contract is visible to operators.

cases.title: Register Access Control and Session Lifecycle
preconditions: Two test users exist: cashier role and manager role.
No active register session on target register.
steps: Sign in as cashier and open a register session.
Attempt restricted register action that requires elevated role.
Escalate to manager and approve override where permitted.
Suspend register session and resume it.
Close register session and record close summary.
expected: Role policy prevents unauthorized action attempts.
Open, suspend, resume, and close transitions succeed with audit trail.
Only one active session exists for register identity.

cases.title: Counter Service Ring Flow with Catalog and Inventory
preconditions: Catalog includes at least five items across two categories.
One item is configured with modifiers and low-stock threshold.
steps: Start counter order and add items from two categories.
Apply required and optional modifiers to one line item.
Send order, hold order, and then resume order for completion.
Complete payment to move order through fulfillment state transitions.
Check inventory decrement and low-stock behavior after sale.
expected: Modifiers enforce required rules and pricing is applied correctly.
Order state transitions are auditable and deterministic.
Inventory decrements on sale and low-stock indicator appears when threshold is crossed.

cases.title: Tender Workflows: Keyed, Cash, Split, and Receipt Delivery
preconditions: Virtual terminal route is enabled.
Register supports cash and card tenders.
steps: Run one keyed CNP payment in virtual terminal.
Run one cash sale with amount tendered greater than due.
Run one split tender sale using card plus cash.
Issue receipt by email and SMS for one completed sale.
Reprint receipt from transaction history.
expected: Manual keyed flow succeeds and persists manual entry mode metadata.
Cash flow calculates change due correctly and records drawer event.
Split tender records both tenders under one sale without duplication.
Receipt delivery and reprint paths complete successfully.

cases.title: Refund/Void Controls, Idempotency, and Immutable Audit
preconditions: Completed sale exists from prior UAT case.
Cashier and manager roles are both available.
steps: Attempt refund as cashier and confirm restriction if policy requires manager.
Perform manager-approved refund or void with required reason code.
Retry the same refund mutation with same idempotency key.
Inspect audit log entries for refund/void action.
Attempt direct mutation of immutable audit data path.
expected: Role policy and reason capture are enforced.
Idempotency blocks duplicate financial mutation.
Audit trail is append-only and tamper resistant.

cases.title: Invoicing and Hosted Link Payment Lifecycle
preconditions: Invoice-capable customer exists with email.
Hosted payment link generation action is enabled.
steps: Create invoice and generate hosted payment link.
Send invoice to customer contact channel.
Pay invoice through hosted link in test mode.
Verify invoice status and outstanding balance updates.
Confirm order timeline reflects invoice settlement state.
expected: Hosted link is generated and resolves to payable checkout experience.
Invoice status transitions are tracked and queryable.

cases.title: Hardware Abstraction and Device Failure Handling
preconditions: Hardware adapters are configured for terminal, scanner, printer, and drawer.
Test environment can simulate printer failure.
steps: Run sale with printer available and verify receipt print queue success.
Simulate printer outage and run another sale.
Verify print retry/backoff behavior and visible failure surfacing.
Run cash sale and verify drawer open policy rules for allowed and blocked actions.
expected: Hardware operations go through abstraction layer rather than direct vendor calls.
Printer failures are retried and surfaced without duplicate charge side effects.
Drawer policy is enforced with auditable no-sale behavior.

cases.title: Reports and Daily Reconciliation
preconditions: At least one completed shift exists with mixed tender transactions.
Reporting permissions granted to test user.
steps: Open commerce reports and verify day/week/month sales aggregates.
Review payment mix report and confirm tender breakdown totals.
Generate and export X report and Z report files.
Run daily reconciliation and capture close variance result.
expected: Report totals match ledger-backed sales aggregates.
X/Z exports are generated in expected formats.
Reconciliation workflow records variance and resolution state.

cases.title: Operational Alerting Coverage
preconditions: Alerting system is connected to commerce metrics.
Synthetic failure trigger is available.
steps: Trigger checkout failure threshold breach in test environment.
Trigger reconciliation anomaly condition.
Verify alert appears in operational dashboard and notification channel.
Acknowledge alert and capture response timestamp.
expected: Checkout and reconciliation alert pathways fire for configured thresholds.
Alert metadata includes tenant, location, severity, and correlation id.

cases.title: Pilot Go/No-Go Financial Correctness Pack
preconditions: All prior UAT cases have evidence artifacts attached.
Pilot decision worksheet is prepared.
steps: Run end-to-end open-register to close-register scenario.
Run rounding, tax, and refund edge-case assertions.
Compile test evidence and unresolved defect list.
Evaluate go/no-go thresholds from MVP contract exit gates.
Record final pilot recommendation with owner sign-off.
expected: End-to-end path is reproducible with no duplicate capture events.
Financial correctness assertions pass for configured edge cases.
Go/no-go decision artifact is complete and reviewable.
